description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages build, test, post-run, and deploy, set GIT_STRATEGY to none, and include a before_script that clones the repo if missing, removes git lock files, resets the remote URL, fetches all refs, checks out the commit SHA, optionally pulls a merge source, updates submodules and shows git status. In the build stage add jobs build-headless, build-login-cli, build-server-cli, and build-voxygen each executing "(cd <dir> && cargo build)" for their respective directories, plus a clean-code job that runs "rustup component add rustfmt-preview" and "cargo fmt --all -- --check". In the post-run stage add a clippy job (allow_failure) that runs "rustup component add clippy-preview --toolchain=nightly" and "cargo clippy --all -- -D clippy || echo \"This job is disabled, because we are not activly using it now, so we dont want to see yellow failed partly\"", and a coverage job that conditionally installs cargo‑tarpaulin and then runs "cargo tarpaulin --skip-clean --all --exclude headless || echo \"There is a problem in tarpaulin which sometimes fails\"". In the test stage add an unittests job that runs "cargo test". In the deploy stage add nightly-linux-debug (only master, always) building all components, packaging them into nightly-linux-debug.tar.bz2; nightly-linux-optimized (only master, manual) building with "--release" and packaging into nightly-linux-optimized.tar.bz2; nightly-windows-debug (only master) cross‑compiling for Windows GNU target and zipping into nightly-windows-debug.zip; nightly-windows-optimized (only master, manual) cross‑compiling with "--release" and zipping into nightly-windows-optimized.zip; stable-linux-optimized (only tags matching vX.Y.Z) building release binaries and creating stable-linux-optimized.tar.bz2; and stable-windows-optimized (only matching tags) building release Windows binaries and creating stable-windows-optimized.zip, each defining appropriate artifact paths and expiration times. No explicit Docker image or services are declared, so the pipeline runs on the default runner environment.
